title: 3959 BBY

The following events took place in '''3959 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
*The [[Jedi Civil War]] begins:<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref> Dark Lords [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] and [[Darth Malak|Malak]] return from the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]] with a massive Sith Fleet. They carve out a new [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]], seize control of [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]], and revitalize the [[Sith Academy (Korriban)|Sith Academy]] there.<ref name="KotORCG">''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]''</ref><ref name="TNEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref>
*The [[Terentatek/Legends|terentateks]] awake from their hibernation when Revan and Malak rise to power.<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic" />
*[[Meetra Surik]] returns to the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] following the [[Mandalorian Wars]], and she is put on [[Trial of Meetra Surik|trial]] by the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]]. The Council subsequently exiles her from the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]].<ref name="exile">Quote from ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' by [[Kavar]]: "You have to understand that it was a time of great uncertainly. We just learned that Darth Revan was back with an armada. Every Jedi that went with him was... lost, corrupted, and as dark as their Master. And then there was you. Many thought you were a spy."</ref>

==Battles==

**[[Battle of Foerost (Jedi Civil War)|Battle of Foerost]]<ref name="TORE" />
